◎简　　介  

　　A cosmetics queen develops a youth formula from jelly taken from queen wasps. She fails to anticipate the typical hoary side- effects.Directors:Roger Corman, Jack Hill (uncredited)Writers:Leo Gordon (screenplay), Kinta Zertuche (story)Stars:Susan Cabot, Anthony Eisley, Barboura Morris
